programme.desc: Chappy's: Gordon visits Chappy's in Tennessee, where the chef and owner's careless methods and less-than-appetising food have hurt his restaurant's local reputation.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Amy's Baking Company: At Amy's Baking Company in Scottsdale, Arizona, Gordon Ramsay meets a husband and wife team with a shocking contempt for customer feedback.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The Funeral: Another personnel change at the precinct puts Peralta and Santiago's budding relationship at risk. Meanwhile, Boyle is attracted to a fellow officer.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle's Hunch: Peralta thinks Boyle might have found his soul-mate in art gallery owner Genevieve. Diaz deals with a case of theft in the precinct building.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: You Only Move Twice: Homer is offered a new job by mysterious businessman Hank Scorpio. But will Marge, Bart and Lisa be happy in their idyllic new home town?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Homer They Fall: Homer becomes a boxer, thanks to his abnormally hard head. But is his skull strong enough for a fight against heavyweight champion Drederick Tatum?

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Revenge O' the Nerds: Beverly decides to re-invent herself by going to night school, but change-averse Murray tries to convince her to take a different path.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Jackie Likes Star Trek: Adam and Jackie fall out over which Halloween costumes to wear. As Lainey visits Erica at college, Barry plots to be reunited with her.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Escape: Haley meets Arvin's parents, but when things don't go as planned, fate leads to an unexpected reunion with all her ex-boyfriends.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Clash of Swords: Mitchell and fanboy Phil sneak out to Hero-Con in Clash of Swords cosplay. Gloria's dinosaur party for Joe is ruined.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: 9 Days: Captain Holt and Peralta contract mumps during an investigation, and decide to be quarantined together so they can use the time to solve the case.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The Cruise: Peralta and Santiago set off on their first real holiday together. Gina and Jeffords help Captain Holt to survive a visit from his sister Debbie.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mountain of Madness: An avalanche traps Homer and Mr Burns in a mountain cabin during a team-building exercise.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Simpsoncalifragilisticexpiala (Annoyed Grunt) cious: Supernanny Shary Bobbins comes to the rescue of Marge, who is so stressed that her hair has started to fall out.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Brand new series - The Last Man Expanding: Springfield's hooked on a weight loss drug. Homer's not sold on it, until Marge begs him to take it. But there's a side effect...

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Halloween of Horror: Homer takes down his festive decorations after Lisa is traumatised by Halloween Horror Night at Krustyland. Marge takes Bart to a trick-or-treating party.

programme.title: First Dates: Be My Valentine
programme.desc: Seeking love on Valentine's are: a 90-year-old army veteran, a TikTok star with a 'dirty builder' thing, and broadcaster India Willoughby on her first date since she transitioned.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: On the Box this time, The Outlaws, Family Fortunes, You, Celebrity Yorkshire Auction House, The Mating Game, and ITV News.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's sharpest armchair critics have been watching: Sitting on a Fortune, Close to Me, You, Nadiya's Fast Flavours, Animal, UFO Witness and This Morning.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: The Naked Newbie: Radical dating show presented by Rylan Clark. Heads are turned as a new naked arrival upsets the singletons' budding connections

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Recently divorced Leanne wants an experimental guy to share her new-found love of sex and ice cream. Ex-US marine Conor has seen plenty of action but struggles to talk to women.

programme.title: First Dates: Be My Valentine
programme.desc: Seeking love on Valentine's are: a 90-year-old army veteran, a TikTok star with a 'dirty builder' thing, and broadcaster India Willoughby on her first date since she transitioned.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: On the Box this time, The Outlaws, Family Fortunes, You, Celebrity Yorkshire Auction House, The Mating Game, and ITV News.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Recently divorced Leanne wants an experimental guy to share her new-found love of sex and ice cream. Ex-US marine Conor has seen plenty of action but struggles to talk to women.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Goldbergs Feel Hard: Erica is accepted into a summer arts school, but Murray struggles to express pride in her achievement. Barry becomes the school mascot.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: A Kick-Ass Risky Business Party: Lainey, Erica and Barry throw a big party but it spirals out of control.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: The One at a Rugby Match: Rugby-loving Wes plans the biggest wedding ever, in front of 26,000 people at a rugby match. But bride-to-be Charlotte wants something intimate.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Clash of Swords: Mitchell and fanboy Phil sneak out to Hero-Con in Clash of Swords cosplay. Gloria's dinosaur party for Joe is ruined.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: I Love a Parade: The Pritchett-Dunphy-Tucker clan set off more than a few fireworks at the Fourth of July parade, where Jay's the grand marshal.

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip featuring animals and food, from the always hilarious Tube that is Rude.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chappy's: Gordon visits Chappy's in Tennessee, where the chef and owner's careless methods and less-than-appetising food have hurt his restaurant's local reputation.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Amy's Baking Company: At Amy's Baking Company in Scottsdale, Arizona, Gordon Ramsay meets a husband and wife team with a shocking contempt for customer feedback.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: A Night to Remember: Barry plans romantic gestures for Lainey on prom night, Erica and Geoff try to attend the event together and a nerdy girl asks Adam out.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Dynamic Duo: Barry tries to drive a wedge between Adam and Pops when they discuss a recently released Batman movie. Erica messes up her college interview.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Dear Beloved Family: Gloria rushes Phil to hospital for emergency surgery when he experiences intense stomach pains.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: In Your Head: Luke goes missing after a night out. Can Manny, Phil and Gloria find him? Haley tries to land an interview with the creator of a big lifestyle website.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Return to Amy's Baking Company: Gordon revisits the most contentious restaurant he's ever tried to rescue - Amy's Baking Company, in Scottsdale, Arizona.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Pantaleone's: In Colorado, Gordon visits Italian restaurant Pantaleone's, whose stubborn owner Pete claims that he makes 'the best pizza in Denver'. Sadly, Gordon doesn't agree.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The Oolong Slayer: Peralta enlists Captain Holt's help while investigating a serial killer. Diaz and Santiago are forced to deal with The Vulture's demands.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Halloween III: The third instalment of Peralta and Holt's 'Halloween heist' involves a tie-breaking contest to be crowned Amazing Detective Slash Genius.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Burns, Baby Burns: Homer concocts a scam with Mr Burns' long-lost illegitimate son Larry (guest star Rodney Dangerfield).

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart After Dark: Bart gets a job at a burlesque theatre. Several residents are keen customers, but others aren't happy to have the showgirls peddling their wares in Springfield.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Girl Talk: Murray's furniture shop faces big competition from a rival. Beverly gives Barry her advice when his attempts to court a girl at school end in failure.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: A Wall Street Thanksgiving: Murray has to intervene when Marvin reveals that he's become a stockbroker and convinces Barry and his friends to invest money with him.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: I Love a Parade: The Pritchett-Dunphy-Tucker clan set off more than a few fireworks at the Fourth of July parade, where Jay's the grand marshal.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Kiss and Tell: Haley asks Mitch and Cam for advice about whether she should tell Arvin about her kiss with Dylan. And Gloria suspects that Manny's Canadian girlfriend isn't real.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Karen Peralta: On his birthday, Peralta takes Santiago to meet his mother. Diaz and Boyle struggle to deal with a new mandate on body cams during a stakeout.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The 9-8: Peralta is reunited with his old partner when the Nine-Nine have to host officers from the Nine-Eight precinct because of a flood.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Itchy & Scratchy & Poochie Show: Homer gets a job on The Itchy & Scratchy Show as the voice of hip-hop surfer dog Poochie, a character brought in to boost viewing figures.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer's Phobia: Homer's prejudices surface when Bart befriends a gay shop owner (guest star John Waters). So he decides to take Bart hunting - but it doesn't go to plan.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Brand new series - P.S. I Hate You: Marge's reputation as Springfield's nicest resident is jeopardised when her secret stash of vitriolic letters is stolen during a house party.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Friend with Benefit: When Lisa becomes friends with Harper, a new girl at school whose family are extremely wealthy, Homer befriends Harper's father.

programme.title: First Dates: Valentine's Special
programme.desc: Chi-Chi and her son Kurtis visit the restaurant together: can she resist interfering in his date with Jaleesa? And Danny discovers that his date's best friend is First Dates waiter Laura.

programme.title: Meet the Fockers
programme.desc: (2004) Comedy sequel. What happens when an ex-CIA prude and ageing, sexually liberated hippies become in-laws? Robert De Niro, Barbara Streisand and Dustin Hoffman show you what happens.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: The leading news stories of the moment.

programme.title: The Drop
programme.desc: (2014) Tense thriller with Tom Hardy, James Gandolfini, Noomi Rapace and Matthias Schoenaerts. Two cousins get into trouble with the gangsters who use their bar to launder illicit cash.

programme.title: Heat and Dust
programme.desc: (1982) Drama with Julie Christie. A woman travels to India to learn about the scandal her great aunt was involved in 60 years earlier. Upsetting scenes/attitudes of the era that may offend.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Hell and High Water
programme.desc: (1954) Cold War thriller. Richard Widmark stars as the leader of a submarine expedition, sent to the frozen depths of Alaska to thwart the Chinese communists' plans to start WWIII.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: Terror by Night
programme.desc: (1946) Sherlock Holmes murder-mystery starring Basil Rathbone and Nigel Bruce. Holmes and Dr Watson are employed to protect a priceless diamond. But it's snatched from under their noses.

programme.title: Broken Lance
programme.desc: (1954) Western. A strict rancher (Spencer Tracy) treats his sons (Robert Wagner, Richard Widmark, Earl Holliman and Hugh O'Brian) as little more than employees, with fatal consequences.

programme.title: Destroyer
programme.desc: (1943) Second World War drama about a warship assigned to mail runs but that ends up engaged in battle anyway, starring Edward G Robinson, Glenn Ford and Marguerite Chapman.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: (2012) Sci-fi action-adventure starring Taylor Kitsch, Liam Neeson and Rihanna. When aliens land spacecraft in the Pacific Ocean, only the US and Japanese navies can save Earth. Violence.

programme.title: The Pope's Exorcist
programme.desc: (2023) Supernatural horror starring Russell Crowe, loosely based on the memoirs of a 'real' exorcist. A case of demonic possession in Spain connects to dark secrets from the Inquisition.

programme.title: 3:10 to Yuma
programme.desc: (2007) Western starring Christian Bale and Russell Crowe. An impoverished rancher tries to earn some money and his family's respect by escorting a dangerous outlaw on his way to jail.

programme.title: Bros
programme.desc: (2022) Billy Eichner stars in the first studio gay romcom as a cynical monogamophobe who - in spite of himself - might just fall in love with hunky Hallmark Channel alumnus Luke Macfarlane.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: (1946) Western romance starring Joel McCrea and Sonny Tufts as a couple of cowboys who compete for the affections of a new schoolteacher from out east, played by Barbara Britton.

programme.title: Criss Cross
programme.desc: (1949) Muscular film noir starring Burt Lancaster and Yvonne De Carlo. A dame convinces her ex-husband, an armoured car guard, to come in on a daring robbery.

programme.title: One Day Interview Special
programme.desc: Stars Anne Hathaway and Jim Sturgess and director Lone Scherfig talk about making the big-screen adaptation of the best-selling novel One Day.

programme.title: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: (1943) Hitchcock thriller starring Joseph Cotten as a serial killer fleeing the law. Teresa Wright is his adoring niece who, initially, refuses to believe her uncle is a murderer.

programme.title: Lifeboat
programme.desc: (1944) Alfred Hitchcock's Oscar-nominated Second World War drama starring Tallulah Bankhead, William Bendix and Walter Slezak as three of the survivors from a liner torpedoed by the Nazis.

programme.title: Fisherman's Friends
programme.desc: (2019) Heart-warming comedy based on the real-life story of the Cornish folk ensemble who took the UK charts by storm in 2010, starring Daniel Mays and Tuppence Middleton.

programme.title: The Other Woman
programme.desc: (2014) Romcom starring Cameron Diaz, Leslie Mann, Kate Upton and Nikolaj Coster-Waldau. Three women take revenge on the man who betrayed their love. Strong language, scenes that may offend.

programme.title: Wuthering Heights
programme.desc: (2011) Andrea Arnold's radical adaptation of Emily Brontë's classic novel of obsessive love, anger and revenge on the weather-beaten Yorkshire moors. With Kaya Scodelario and James Howson.

programme.title: Smoke Sauna Sisterhood
programme.desc: (2023) Anna Hints's award-winning and insightful documentary centres around a group of women taking traditional smoke saunas over a period of time, in the depths of an Estonian forest.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Animal Farm
programme.desc: (1954) George Orwell's cautionary tale reimagined in cartoon form. A farm's animals revolt against their abusive owner only for the pigs to become drunk with their newly found power.

programme.title: Written on the Wind
programme.desc: (1956) Lauren Bacall, Robert Stack, Rock Hudson and Dorothy Malone star in Douglas Sirk's drama, a commentary on 1950s life that's disguised as a lurid, glossy soap opera.

programme.title: Sink the Bismarck!
programme.desc: (1960) Second World War drama. Kenneth More stars as the British captain charged with finding and destroying the Bismarck, Germany's largest battleship. Directed by Lewis Gilbert.

programme.title: The Comancheros
programme.desc: (1961) Western starring John Wayne and Stuart Whitman. A Texas Ranger is forced to team up with his prisoner while he's on a covert mission to take on a band of thieves and gunrunners.

programme.title: Independence Day: Resurgence
programme.desc: (2016) Sci-fi blockbuster sequel starring Jeff Goldblum and Liam Hemsworth. Twenty years after Earth repelled a devastating alien invasion, the extraterrestrials return to finish the job.

programme.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
programme.desc: (2017) Taron Egerton returns as the newest recruit to the stylish secret agency Kingsman for more ass-kicking comedy action. A star-studded cast includes Julianne Moore and Elton John.

programme.title: Babylon
programme.desc: (2022) Margot Robbie and Brad Pitt star in Damien Chazelle's opulently decadent, satirical look at Hollywood in the 1920s as it teeters between the silent the era and the 'talkies'.

programme.title: Alice, Darling
programme.desc: (2022) Provocative psychological thriller with Anna Kendrick. A woman's friends stage an intervention to get her to see she's in a controlling relationship. But what will the boyfriend do?

programme.title: The Drop
programme.desc: (2014) Tense thriller with Tom Hardy, James Gandolfini, Noomi Rapace and Matthias Schoenaerts. Two cousins get into trouble with the gangsters who use their bar to launder illicit cash.

programme.title: Heat and Dust
programme.desc: (1982) Drama with Julie Christie. A woman travels to India to learn about the scandal her great aunt was involved in 60 years earlier. Upsetting scenes/attitudes of the era that may offend.
